name: part_007
file: tmp_【#白銀ノエル生誕祭2025】生誕 3D LIVE 睡夢 - suimu -【白銀ノエル⧸ホロライブ】 [eV59GTk0J3s]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_007.webm

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel and Shiranui Flare continue their performance of 'Planetarium'.
Shirogane Noel transitions into the next section, drawing her signature on the screen.
Shirogane Noel performs 'RELAY', later joined by Houshou Marine and Usada Pekora.

subtitles.original: 泣かないよ　届くだろう　きれいな空だったから
subtitles.english: I won't cry; they'll surely reach you, since the sky was so beautiful.

subtitles.original: あの道まで響く靴の音が耳に残る
subtitles.english: The sound of footsteps echoing to that road lingers in my ears.

subtitles.original: 大きな自分の影を見つめて思うのでしょう
subtitles.english: Gazing at my long shadow, I find myself lost in thought.

subtitles.original: ちっとも変わらないはずなのに　せつない気持ちふくらんでく
subtitles.english: Though nothing should have changed, this painful feeling just keeps growing.

subtitles.original: どんなに想ったって君はもういない
subtitles.english: No matter how much I think of you, you're no longer here.

subtitles.original: 行きたいよ　君のそばに　小さくても　小さくても
subtitles.english: I want to go to your side, even if I'm small, even if I'm small.

subtitles.original: 1番に　君が好きだよ　強くいられる
subtitles.english: I love you more than anyone; you're the reason I can be strong.

subtitles.original: 願いを　流れ星に　そっと唱えてみたけれど
subtitles.english: I tried softly whispering my wish to a shooting star, but...

subtitles.original: 泣かないよ　届くだろう　きれいな空に
subtitles.english: I won't cry; they'll surely reach you, in the beautiful sky.

subtitles.original: 会えなくても記憶をたどって　同じ幸せを見たいんだ
subtitles.english: Even if we can't meet, I'll trace my memories; I want to see that same happiness.

subtitles.original: あの香りと共に花火がぱっと開く
subtitles.english: Along with that scent, the fireworks suddenly burst open.

subtitles.original: 行きたいよ　君のところへ　小さな手をにぎりしめて
subtitles.english: I want to go to where you are, squeezing your small hand tight.

subtitles.original: 泣きたいよ　それはそれはきれいな空だった
subtitles.english: I want to cry; it was such a very, very beautiful sky.

subtitles.original: 願いを　流れ星に　そっと唱えてみたけれど
subtitles.english: I tried softly whispering my wish to a shooting star, but...

subtitles.original: 泣きたいよ　届かない想いをこの空に...
subtitles.english: I want to cry; sending these unreachable feelings into this sky...

subtitles.original: もう何十回もう何百回も　震むソラ見上げて
subtitles.english: Dozens, hundreds of times, looking up at the blurred sky.

subtitles.original: 辿り着いた場所が　運命のダイヤモンド
subtitles.english: The place I finally reached is the diamond of fate.

subtitles.original: 何千回もう何万回も　涙流したきみへ
subtitles.english: To you, who has shed tears thousands, tens of thousands of times.

subtitles.original: ねえ諦められたことはあったっけ？
subtitles.english: Hey, was there ever anything you truly gave up on?

subtitles.original: 「憧れ＝限界」だから　もういらないよ
subtitles.english: Because 'Admiration = Limit,' I don't need it anymore.

subtitles.original: そこに留まるなんて　もったいないでしょ
subtitles.english: Just staying there would be such a waste, wouldn't it?

subtitles.original: それぞれの物語　交差する瞬間を
subtitles.english: The moments where our individual stories intersect.

subtitles.original: 見つめる意味は
subtitles.english: The meaning of gazing upon them is...

subtitles.original: 放った夢だけ　大きな弧を描いて
subtitles.english: Only the dreams we released draw a great arc.

subtitles.original: はちきれそうな煌めきを　消えることなく　どこまででも
subtitles.english: A brilliance about to burst, never fading, going anywhere and everywhere.
